studies.risk_class: Risk Class I according to MDR
studies.duration_additional_info: Participants were required to use the app for at least 12 weeks and answer questions at four time points over a minimum of 12 weeks. The study ran from December 2021 to February 2024.
studies.intervention_and_control_group: Intervention group: access to the full version of the Cara Care für Reizdarm app; Control group: standard of care without use of the Cara Care für Reizdarm app or an alternative app. Total enrolled: 378 (planned: 374).
studies.additional_info_about_trial_arms: Arm 1 (Intervention): Access to the full version of the Cara Care für Reizdarm app for at least 12 weeks. Arm 2 (Control): Standard of care with no application of the Cara Care für Reizdarm app or an alternative app.
studies.collected_data: Primary outcome: Change in disease-specific symptom severity measured by IBS-SSS (Irritable Bowel Syndrome Severity Scoring System) in intervention and control groups. Additional primary measures: Quality of life (IBS-QOL), work and activity impairment (WPAI:IBS), health literacy (HLS-EU-Q16). Secondary outcomes: Anxiety (GAD-7), depressiveness (PHQ-9). All data collected via standardized, validated health questionnaires within the app at four time points over at least 12 weeks.

audit.study_title: DiGA Cara Care für Reizdarm - Evaluation of a non-invasive, non-additionally burdensome, prospective, multicentered, two-armed, randomized trial with parallel group design
audit.note: registry-only: outcome measures captured under collected_data; no reported results
